summary: Good‑to‑great FM broadcast of a joyful free concert with standout China Cat Sunflower and a fiery Wang Dang Doodle, captured in solid sound.
review: The recording captures the festive atmosphere of the November 3, 1991 “Laughter, Love and Music” benefit at Golden Gate Park. Reviewers rave about the band’s energy – highlighting a beautiful China Cat Sunflower and an inspired Wang Dang Doodle with John Popper – and note that the FM‑derived sound is clear and well‑balanced. The show flows from a circus of guest acts into two full Dead sets, delivering an emotionally charged, crowd‑singing experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Three detailed positive reviews (5, 4, 4 stars) praise both the performance and the FM broadcast quality; no negative points were raised.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the FM sound as good‑to‑great with clear instrument separation; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Festival‑style event with many guest acts leading into two full Dead sets; the band delivered a cohesive, emotionally resonant performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his strong guitar work and excellent partnership with John Fogerty.
band_member_comments.Bob: Noted as part of the tight backing on the Fogerty set.
band_member_comments.Keys: Welnick’s keyboards were highlighted as sounding good; China Cat Sunflower described as beautiful.
